description: gt mq list (and gt patrol new) internally call 'bd list --json --flat' but --flat is no longer a valid flag in bd 0.58.0. gt version: v0.11.0-89-ga16030f8. Causes gt mq list to fail entirely and patrol discovery to fail with warnings.
title: gt mq list broken: bd --flat flag removed in bd 0.58.0
